# Roborabbit API

**OpenAPI spec included** · [View spec →](./2.0.0/openapi.json) · *Generated by Jentic — the vendor does not publish an official OpenAPI specification.*

Run browser automation tasks asynchronously and retrieve structured outputs, video recordings, and screenshots through 8 endpoints.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Base URL** | `https://api.roborabbit.com` |
| **Auth** | Bearer Token |
| **Endpoints** | 8 |

## What you can build with this API

- Trigger pre-configured browser automation tasks and poll for completion with video proof
- Extract structured data from web pages using headless browser sessions
- Monitor task execution history with per-run status, screenshots, and recordings
- Serve scraped data as custom JSON feeds for downstream consumption
- Track account quota and usage across automated browser runs

Does not handle task creation or visual workflow design — use the Roborabbit dashboard to configure tasks, then trigger and monitor them via this API.

## Key endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /v1/tasks/{task_uid}/runs | Execute a browser automation task |
| GET | /v1/tasks/{task_uid}/runs/{uid} | Retrieve run status and results |
| GET | /v1/tasks | List all configured tasks |
| GET | /v1/tasks/{uid} | Retrieve specific task details |
| GET | /v1/tasks/{task_uid}/runs | List runs for a task |
| GET | /v1/feeds | List custom JSON data feeds |

## Key resources

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| Tasks | List and inspect configured browser automation tasks |
| Runs | Execute tasks and retrieve results, screenshots, and recordings |
| Feeds | Access structured JSON outputs from completed runs |
| Account | Check quota and usage metrics |

## Use this API with Jentic

| Platform | Install | Works with |
|----------|---------|------------|
| **MCP** | Server URL: `https://api.jentic.com/mcp` | Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code |
| **OpenClaw** | `clawhub install jentic` | OpenClaw agents |
| **Python** | `pip install jentic` | LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, custom agents |

See setup guides: [Claude Desktop](https://docs.jentic.com/guides/mcp/claude-desktop-remote/) | [Cursor](https://docs.jentic.com/guides/mcp/cursor-remote/) | [Windsurf](https://docs.jentic.com/guides/mcp/windsurf-remote/) | [ChatGPT](https://docs.jentic.com/guides/mcp/chatgpt/)

TypeScript SDK not yet available — [request it here](https://github.com/jentic/jentic-public-apis/issues).

### Python quickstart

Add your Roborabbit credentials to Jentic once. Your agent gets a scoped access key and can discover, inspect, and call any operation — raw secrets never enter the prompt chain.

```python
import asyncio
from jentic import Jentic, SearchRequest, LoadRequest, ExecutionRequest

async def main():
    client = Jentic()
    search = await client.search(SearchRequest(query="run a browser automation task and get the results"))
    entity_id = search.results[0].id
    details = await client.load(LoadRequest(ids=[entity_id]))
    result = await client.execute(
        ExecutionRequest(
            id=entity_id,
            inputs={"task_uid": "task_abc123"}
        )
    )
    print(result)

asyncio.run(main())
```

Works with LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK, and any MCP-compatible framework.
